pids.name: Supported PIDs [$21-$40]
pids.name_zh: 支持的PID [$21-$40]

pids.name: Distance Traveled While MIL is Activated
pids.name_zh: MIL激活期间行驶距离
pids.description: Reset to $0000 when MIL changes from deactivated to activated. Accumulate km while MIL ON. Do not change while MIL OFF. Reset if cleared by Service $04 or 40 warm-ups without MIL. Does not wrap at $FFFF. Freeze if no vehicle speed source available.
pids.description_zh: MIL从未激活变为激活时重置为$0000。MIL点亮期间按公里累计。MIL熄灭时不变。通过Service $04清除或40次暖机无MIL后重置。达到$FFFF不回绕。无车速来源时冻结数值。

items.label: MIL_DIST
items.name: Distance Traveled While MIL is Activated
items.name_zh: MIL激活期间行驶距离

pids.name: Fuel Pressure (relative to manifold vacuum)
pids.name_zh: 燃油压力（相对于歧管真空）
pids.description: FP shall display fuel pressure when the reading is referenced to manifold vacuum (relative pressure).
pids.description_zh: FP显示以歧管真空为基准的燃油压力（相对压力）。

items.label: FP_REL
items.name: Fuel Pressure (relative to manifold vacuum)
items.name_zh: 燃油压力（相对于歧管真空）

pids.name: Fuel Rail Pressure (gauge)
pids.name_zh: 燃油轨压力（表压）
pids.description: FRP shall display fuel rail pressure at the engine referenced to atmosphere (gauge pressure). Intended for diesel fuel pressure and gasoline direct injection systems with higher pressure range than PIDs $0A and $22.
pids.description_zh: FRP显示以大气压力为基准的发动机燃油轨压力（表压）。适用于柴油燃油压力和比PID $0A和$22压力范围更高的汽油直喷系统。

items.label: FRP
items.name: Fuel Rail Pressure (gauge)
items.name_zh: 燃油轨压力（表压）

pids.name: Wide Range O2 Sensor - Lambda and Voltage - B1S1 ($13) / B1S1 ($1D)
pids.name_zh: 宽域氧传感器Lambda及电压 - 组1传感器1($13) / 组1传感器1($1D)
pids.description: PIDs $24-$2B: Linear or wide-ratio O2 sensors displaying equivalence ratio and voltage. If PID $4F is not supported or includes $00, use default scaling. Otherwise calculate per PID $4F definition.
pids.description_zh: PID $24-$2B：显示当量比和电压的线性或宽域氧传感器。如PID $4F不支持或包含$00，使用默认缩放。否则按PID $4F定义计算。

pids.name: Commanded EGR
pids.name_zh: 指令EGR
pids.description: Commanded EGR displayed as a percent, normalized to max EGR commanded output. 0% = no flow (off/fully closed), 100% = max flow (on/fully open). Applies to on/off solenoid, duty-cycled vacuum solenoid, linear or stepper motor valve, or any other actuation method.
pids.description_zh: EGR指令值以百分比显示，归一化到最大EGR指令输出。0%=无流量（关闭/全关），100%=最大流量（开启/全开）。适用于开关电磁阀、占空比真空电磁阀、直线或步进电机阀或任何其他驱动方式。

items.label: EGR_PCT
items.name: Commanded EGR
items.name_zh: 指令EGR

pids.name: EGR Error
pids.name_zh: EGR误差
pids.description: EGR error as a percent of commanded EGR. Defined as: ((EGR_actual - EGR_commanded) / EGR_commanded) * 100%. Negative = less than commanded, positive = more than commanded. When commanded EGR = 0%, report 0% if actual = 0%, or 99.2% if actual > 0%. If closed loop control is not used, this PID shall not be supported.
pids.description_zh: EGR误差为指令EGR的百分比。定义为：((实际EGR - 指令EGR) / 指令EGR) × 100%。负值=低于指令值，正值=高于指令值。指令EGR为0%时，若实际为0%则报告0%，若实际>0%则报告99.2%。未使用闭环控制时不应支持此PID。

items.label: EGR_ERR
items.name: EGR Error
items.name_zh: EGR误差

pids.name: Commanded Evaporative Purge
pids.name_zh: 指令蒸发净化
pids.description: Commanded evaporative purge control valve displayed as a percent, normalized to max EVAP purge commanded output. 0% = no flow (off/fully closed), 100% = max flow (on/fully open).
pids.description_zh: 蒸发净化控制阀指令值以百分比显示，归一化到最大蒸发净化指令输出。0%=无流量（关闭/全关），100%=最大流量（开启/全开）。

items.label: EVAP_PCT
items.name: Commanded Evaporative Purge
items.name_zh: 指令蒸发净化

pids.name: Fuel Level Input
pids.name_zh: 燃油液位输入
pids.description: FLI indicates nominal fuel tank liquid fill capacity as a percent of maximum. May be from sensor, vehicle serial data bus, or inferred. Gaseous fuel vehicles display percent of usable fuel capacity. Bi-fuel vehicles report from the tank of the fuel type currently in use.
pids.description_zh: FLI指示油箱液体装填量占最大容量的百分比。可来自传感器、车辆串行数据总线或推算。使用气体燃料的车辆显示可用燃料容量百分比。双燃料车辆报告当前使用的燃料类型所在油箱的值。

items.label: FLI
items.name: Fuel Level Input
items.name_zh: 燃油液位输入

pids.name: Number of Warm-ups Since DTCs Cleared
pids.name_zh: 清除DTC后暖机次数
pids.description: Number of OBD warm-up cycles since all DTCs were cleared. A warm-up: coolant temp rises ≥22°C (40°F) from engine start and reaches ≥70°C (160°F) (≥60°C/140°F for diesel). Remains at 255 if exceeded; does not wrap. May be reported by single ECU or each MIL-activating ECU.
pids.description_zh: 清除所有DTC后的OBD暖机循环次数。暖机定义：冷却液温度从发动机启动后上升≥22°C(40°F)并达到≥70°C(160°F)（柴油≥60°C/140°F）。超过255次后保持255不回绕。可由单个ECU或每个可激活MIL的ECU报告。

items.label: WARM_UPS
items.name: Number of warm-ups since DTCs cleared
items.name_zh: 清除DTC后暖机次数

pids.name: Distance Traveled Since DTCs Cleared
pids.name_zh: 清除DTC后行驶距离
pids.description: Distance accumulated since DTCs were cleared. Not associated with any particular DTC; indicates last time DTCs were cleared by external test equipment. Remains at 65,535 km if exceeded; does not wrap. Freeze if no vehicle speed source available.
pids.description_zh: 清除DTC后累计的行驶距离。不与特定DTC关联；指示上次通过外部测试设备清除DTC的时间。超过65,535公里后保持不回绕。无车速来源时冻结数值。

items.label: CLR_DIST
items.name: Distance traveled since DTCs cleared
items.name_zh: 清除DTC后行驶距离

pids.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure
pids.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力
pids.description: Evaporative system vapor pressure, normally from a fuel tank pressure (FTP) sensor or evap system vapor line sensor. For wider range, use PID $54 instead. Only one of PID $32, $54, or $A3 shall be supported.
pids.description_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力，通常来自油箱压力(FTP)传感器或蒸发系统蒸气管路传感器。如需更宽范围，使用PID $54。PID $32、$54、$A3仅可支持其中一个。

items.label: EVAP_VP
items.name: Evap System Vapor Pressure
items.name_zh: 蒸发系统蒸气压力

pids.name: Barometric Pressure
pids.name_zh: 大气压力
pids.description: BARO normally obtained from a dedicated sensor, from MAP sensor at key-on, or inferred from MAF sensor and other inputs. Weather services may report BARO adjusted to sea level; displayed value may differ. After battery disconnect, inferred BARO stored in NVRAM may not be accurate.
pids.description_zh: 大气压力通常来自专用传感器、钥匙开启时的MAP传感器、或由MAF传感器及其他输入推算。气象服务可能报告调整至海平面的气压值，显示值可能不同。断电后，存储在NVRAM中的推算气压值可能不准确。

items.label: BARO
items.name: Barometric Pressure
items.name_zh: 大气压力
